functions.description: Retrieves a value from the captured Data Controller store by matching the Record ID.
functions.name: GET

parameters.description: Optional. The unique Record ID to find. Returns headers if empty.
parameters.name: id

parameters.description: Optional. The name of the property to retrieve. Returns the entire record if empty.
parameters.name: fieldName

parameters.description: Optional. The name of the data table. Uses default if empty.
parameters.name: dataTableName

parameters.description: Optional. The revision number. Uses the latest by default.
parameters.name: rev

functions.description: Searches for a value in a specific column and returns multiple matching records.
functions.name: SEARCH

parameters.description: The column name to search in.
parameters.name: searchField

parameters.description: The value to find.
parameters.name: searchValue

parameters.description: The column name of the value to return.
parameters.name: returnField

parameters.description: Optional. The name of the data table. Uses default if empty.
parameters.name: dataTableName

parameters.description: Optional. The revision number. Uses the latest by default.
parameters.name: rev

functions.description: Returns all full records that match a specific criteria.
functions.name: FILTER

parameters.description: The column name to search in.
parameters.name: searchField

parameters.description: The value to find.
parameters.name: searchValue

parameters.description: Optional. The name of the data table.
parameters.name: dataTableName

parameters.description: Optional. The revision number.
parameters.name: rev

parameters.description: Optional. Set to true for an exact match. Default is false (partial match).
parameters.name: exactMatch

functions.description: Sums all numerical values in a specified column.
functions.name: SUM

parameters.description: The column name to sum.
parameters.name: sumField

parameters.description: Optional. The name of the data table.
parameters.name: dataTableName

parameters.description: Optional. The revision number.
parameters.name: rev

functions.description: Sums values in a column based on a specific condition.
functions.name: SUMIFS

parameters.description: The column name to sum.
parameters.name: sumField

parameters.description: The column name to check.
parameters.name: criteriaField

parameters.description: The value to match.
parameters.name: criteriaValue

parameters.description: Optional. The name of the data table.
parameters.name: dataTableName

parameters.description: Optional. The revision number.
parameters.name: rev

functions.description: Joins a base table with a foreign table and appends a selected column from the foreign table.
functions.name: JOIN

parameters.description: The name of the primary data table (e.g., Orders).
parameters.name: baseTableName

parameters.description: The column in the base table that links to the foreign table (e.g., CustomerID).
parameters.name: foreignKeyField

parameters.description: The name of the related table to look up (e.g., Customers).
parameters.name: foreignTableName

parameters.description: The column in the foreign table to retrieve and append (e.g., CustomerName).
parameters.name: foreignReturnField

functions.description: Returns all records sorted by a specific column.
functions.name: SORT

parameters.description: The column name to sort by.
parameters.name: sortField

parameters.description: Optional. Sort ascending (TRUE) or descending (FALSE). Default is TRUE.
parameters.name: ascending

parameters.description: Optional. The name of the data table. Uses default if empty.
parameters.name: dataTableName

parameters.description: Optional. The revision number. Uses the latest by default.
parameters.name: rev
